title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Jeff Su presents Claude Cowork, a system that transforms Claude from a chatbot into a full operating system for work. The approach includes CLAUDE.md instruction files, persistent memory, a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects, and practical demonstrations like Email HQ and spending trackers.
